roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1, #2, #3 AND #4 /3000REIN/PAJ: 60 DAYS/X: WITH TIME LOST/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 30 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW  INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE  APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/X: BAIL IS SET ON PAROLE ARRAIGNMENT/NB/ /X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PRC STATUS /DOP/

/CAL: STATUS OF PRC/ /DAWT/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/X: REMANDED TODAY FOR CUSTODY CREIDTS/SHER2: 11-22-20/NB/X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: PAROLE ARRAIGNMENT NEXT DATE/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/X: RELEASE FOR PRC COLLABORATIVE COURT EVALUATION/CTORD: MEET WITH PAROLE COURTREPRESENTATIVE CHARLES BROWN UPON   RELEASE /X: HOUSING PENDING BED AVAILABILITY/ /OR/CONT/
/CAL: PAROLE CASE STATUS/DAWT/ /X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/CONT/DOPC/
